title: MBTI Personality Test
seoDescription: Free MBTI personality test. Discover your 16-type personality with this quick and easy assessment. Based on Myers-Briggs Type Indicator dimensions.
howToUseTitle: How to Take the MBTI Test
step1Desc: Answer 12 simple questions about your preferences and behavior. Be honest for accurate results.
step2Desc: After completing all questions, discover your 4-letter MBTI personality type.
step3Desc: Read about your personality type's strengths, weaknesses, and suitable career paths.
faq1Q: Is this an official MBTI test?
faq1A: This is a simplified self-assessment based on MBTI dimensions. For official results, consult a certified practitioner.
faq2A: The test provides a good indication of your preferences but is not a clinical diagnosis.
faq3Q: Can my type change over time?
faq3A: While core preferences tend to be stable, life experiences can influence how they express.
